name: Redline
description: Annotate elements in a running web app with visual feedback, then auto-fix the flagged issues in source code.
longDescription:
Two modes: `/redline setup` installs a dev-only annotation overlay into any web project (Vite, Next.js, Remix, SvelteKit, CRA, Tauri, plain HTML) — activated via `Cmd+Shift+A` hotkey, click elements to add feedback, exports a JSON file with selectors, outerHTML, child hints, and full computed CSS.

`/redline <filename>` reads the annotation JSON, locates source components by tracing `html` attributes and selector paths through the JSX tree, then dispatches parallel fix agents per file. Handles large annotation files (100K+ tokens) via targeted node extraction. Ambiguous comments are flagged for clarification instead of guessed.
